Stop.command: { git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACM HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null; } | grep '\.java$' | tr '\n' '\0' | xargs -0 -r '/Applications/IntelliJ IDEA.app/Contents/bin/idea' format 2>/dev/null || true
Stop.description: Apply Naver code convention to modified/added Java files on conversation end
